heading: Officers: computation of years of service for voluntary retirement
label: 20602 Officers: computation of years of service for voluntary retirement

children.heading: .—Years of Active Service
children.label: a .—Years of Active Service
children.text: For the purpose of determining whether an officer of the Space Force may be retired under , the officer’s years of service are computed by adding all active service in the armed forces.section 20601 of this title

children.heading: .—Reference to Section Excluding Service During Certain Periods
children.label: b .—Reference to Section Excluding Service During Certain Periods
children.text: excludes from computation of an officer’s years of service for purposes of this section any time identified with respect to that officer under that section.Section 972(b) of this title
